title: Baseball Savant Leaderboards 2024 (via savant-extras)
subtitle: All 16 Baseball Savant leaderboards as clean CSV files, collected with savant-extras
description:
# Baseball Savant Leaderboards 2024

16 Baseball Savant leaderboards for the **2024 MLB season**, collected using the [savant-extras](https://pypi.org/project/savant-extras/) Python package.

## Files (16 CSVs)

| File | Category | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `bat_tracking_2024.csv` | Batting | Bat speed, attack angle, swing tilt |
| `batted_ball_2024.csv` | Batting | GB/FB/LD rates, pull/oppo splits |
| `home_runs_2024.csv` | Batting | HR distance, exit velo, xHR, no-doubters |
| `swing_take_2024.csv` | Batting | Run values by zone (heart/shadow/chase/waste) |
| `year_to_year_2024.csv` | Batting | xwOBA year-over-year changes |
| `pitch_tempo_2024.csv` | Pitching | Median seconds between pitches |
| `pitch_movement_2024.csv` | Pitching | Horizontal and vertical break by pitch type |
| `pitcher_arm_angle_2024.csv` | Pitching | Release point angles |
| `running_game_2024.csv` | Pitching | Pitcher running game control |
| `timer_infractions_2024.csv` | Pitching | Pitch clock violations |
| `arm_strength_2024.csv` | Fielding | Fielder throw speed by position |
| `catcher_blocking_2024.csv` | Catching | Blocks above average |
| `catcher_throwing_2024.csv` | Catching | Pop time, CS rate, arm strength |
| `catcher_stance_2024.csv` | Catching | One-knee vs traditional stance impact |
| `baserunning_2024.csv` | Baserunning | Total baserunning run value |
| `basestealing_2024.csv` | Baserunning | Stolen base run value, lead distances |

## How This Data Was Collected

All data was fetched from [Baseball Savant](https://baseballsavant.mlb.com/) using **[savant-extras](https://github.com/yasumorishima/savant-extras)** — a Python package that provides 33 functions covering 16 leaderboards that [pybaseball](https://github.com/jldbc/pybaseball) does not support.

```python
pip install savant-extras

from savant_extras import bat_tracking, pitch_tempo, home_runs  # etc.
df = bat_tracking("2024-04-01", "2024-09-30")
```

## Links

- **savant-extras on PyPI**: [pypi.org/project/savant-extras](https://pypi.org/project/savant-extras/)
- **Source code**: [github.com/yasumorishima/savant-extras](https://github.com/yasumorishima/savant-extras)

## Data Source

Data from [Baseball Savant](https://baseballsavant.mlb.com/) (MLB Advanced Media). 2024 regular season.
